data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: OperationFailed
data.value: The operation could not be completed.

data.name: PaymentNotFound
data.value: The payment was not found.

data.name: InvoiceNotFound
data.value: The invoice was not found.

data.name: InvalidAmount
data.value: The amount must be greater than {0}.

data.name: Amount must be greater than zero
data.value: Amount must be greater than zero

data.name: Customer name is required
data.value: Customer name is required

data.name: Customer name must have 3 to 250 characters
data.value: Customer name must have 3 to 250 characters

data.name: Guest stay identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Guest stay identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Hotel identifier is required
data.value: Hotel identifier is required

data.name: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Invoice number is required
data.value: Invoice number is required

data.name: Invoice number must have 3 to 50 characters
data.value: Invoice number must have 3 to 50 characters

data.name: Payment identifier is required
data.value: Payment identifier is required

data.name: Payment identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Payment identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Payment method is required
data.value: Payment method is required

data.name: Payment method must be cash card transfer or yape
data.value: Payment method must be cash card transfer or yape

data.name: Reservation identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Reservation identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: Status is required
data.value: Status is required

data.name: Status must be pending paid or cancelled
data.value: Status must be pending paid or cancelled
